name: stage2-rvv-low-precision-contraction-primitive-surface-gate1
title: Stage2 RVV low-precision contraction primitive surface campaign
description: Macro campaign for RVV low-precision contraction primitives; Gates 1-3 are complete and Gate 4 is active for Gearbox/resource-aware selected-body realization plus measured same-target comparison.
creator: codex
notes: Gates 1-3 are complete. Gate 4 primitive source/load/extension, widening-product role/policy facts, selected-dispatch no-win denial, packed-i4 low-shifted-product-rescale repair, evidence-root policy ingestion, resource-cost/admission decision consumption, high-nibble vwmacc schedule/resource repair, measured admission closure, local-repair frontier closure, and the current beyond-local no-further-repair admission blocker now flow through Gearbox resource admission, selected-body realization/admission handoff, route metadata, target artifact mirrors, generated-bundle checks, same-target measurement records/evidence roots, production-pressure policy inputs, selected-dispatch policy evaluation, and direct measurement-outcome policy consumption. The current packed-i4 resource-cost contract is rvv-low-precision-packed-i4-resource-cost-contract.v1 with model high-nibble-vwmacc-loop-11-peak-live-5of32-two-region-vsetvl.v1, loop-body steps 11, peak live vector groups 5/32, blocker packed-i4-local-repair-frontier-loop-11-budget-5of32-no-win, no-win admission decision deny-performance-preferred-with-resource-cost-no-win-blocker, closure no-safe-local-packed-i4-repair-frontier-loop-11-budget-5of32.v1, reopen requirement provider-repair-beyond-local-statement-frontier-plus-source-backed-measured-win-and-updated-admission-facts.v1, beyond-local contract rvv-low-precision-packed-i4-beyond-local-repair-admission.v1, beyond-local decision deny-performance-preferred-no-provider-repair-beyond-local-frontier, beyond-local blocker packed-i4-no-provider-beyond-local-repair-facts, and beyond-local reopen requirement new-typed-provider-beyond-local-repair-plus-source-backed-measured-win-and-updated-admission-facts.v1. No fresh ssh rvv timing was required in this slice because generated RVV statement scheduling and resource model counts did not change; the existing source-backed no-win evidence remains dequant 0.897163..1.018998 with 12 summaries / 60 measurements / 12 correctness records, and dequant-clamp 0.864516..1.043210 with 24 summaries / 120 measurements / 24 correctness records. Route support and correctness execution remain allowed through correctness-fallback; performance-preferred remains denied unless a later provider-owned repair beyond the local statement frontier produces source-backed measured-win evidence and updates maturity, target mirrors, measurement roots, resource-cost admission, closure/reopen, beyond-local admission facts, and policy facts. Macro remains active for the next Gate 4 provider-owned schedule/resource repair beyond the local statement frontier plus fresh same-target timing, or a later campaign-level no-further-repair decision backed by new typed/provider facts.
